title: Figure 15 from: Rathnayaka AR, Chethana KWT, Manowong A, Bhagya AT, Win H, Tun ZL, Mapook A, Hyde KD (2025) Taxonomy, phylogeny, and bioactive potential of Xylariales (Sordariomycetes, Ascomycota) from Thailand: novel species discovery, new host and geographical records, and antibacterial properties. MycoKeys 120: 35-117. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.120.155915
author: Rathnayaka, Achala R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 15 Hypomontagnella hibisci on a decaying branch of Hibiscus sp. (MFLU 24-0532, Holotype). a. Substrate; b. Mature stroma on the bark; c. Stromatal surface showing papillate and ostiolar discs (indicated by white arrows); d–f. Stromata in vertical sections; g. Peridium; h. Paraphyses; i–m. Asci; n. Apical apparatus with Melzer's reagent; o–r. Ascospores; s, t. Colony on the PDA (s upper, t lower). Scale bars: 2 mm (b); 1 mm (c); 200 μm (d); 100 μm (e); 50 μm (f); 10 μm (g, n); 20 μm (h–m); 5 μm (o–r).
